history.metaDescription: Discover the history of Sint-Geertruikerk and the abbey in Leuven.
history.heroAlt: Interior of Sint-Geertruikerk with woodwork and vaulting
history.heading: History
history.intro: The <abdij>Sint-Geertrui Abbey</abdij> and its surroundings tell a story of centuries of prayer, music, and city life in <leuven>Leuven</leuven>. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Praesent semper feugiat nibh sed pulvinar.
history.section1p1: In the early Middle Ages, <kanunniken>regular canons</kanunniken> formed the core of the religious community. Vestibulum mattis ullamcorper velit sed ullamcorper morbi tincidunt ornare massa.
history.section1p2: Under <hendrik>Henry I of Brabant</hendrik>, the foundation gained greater political and cultural weight. Integer enim neque volutpat ac tincidunt vitae semper quis lectus.
history.section2p1: The bond between the monastery and the urban fabric remained strong for centuries. Nulla facilisi morbi tempus iaculis urna id volutpat lacus laoreet non curabitur.
history.section2p2: Today the ensemble bears witness to late Gothic and Baroque. Arcu cursus vitae congue mauris rhoncus aenean vel elit scelerisque mauris pellentesque.

ev01.description: A vibrant carillon concert with sounds drifting across the city.
